# Mgmtsystem Nonconformity Maintenance

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This is a bridge module between Management System and Maintenance

This module contains some new features for Management System modules.

Nonconformity (NC)

- Maintenance Request: add a field to link a specific maintenance request.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

NC Maintenance

- Go to Maintenance → Maintenance Request → create a new one
- Go to Management System → Nonconformity
- Create new Nonconformity
- Select a Maintenance Request on the list

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/management-system/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/management-system/issues/new?body=module:%20mgmtsystem_nonconformity_maintenance%0Aversion:%2012.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
